# Infrastructure Setup Guide ($50/month Bootstrap)

## Overview
Ultra-cost-effective infrastructure using free cloud tiers. All components have zero-cost options with 49/month buffer for emergencies.

---

## Component 1: Frontend (Vercel) — FREE

**Status:** Already deployed at https://learnverse-delta.vercel.app

**Free Tier Limits:**
- 100 GB bandwidth/month (sufficient for ~500 users)
- Unlimited serverless functions
- Automatic Git deployments
- Edge caching

**No action needed** — keep current setup

---

## Component 2: Backend API (Railway) — FREE → $5/month Phase 2

### Setup Railway Free Tier

```bash
1. Go to railway.app
2. Create new project
3. Add PostgreSQL plugin (free 5GB)
4. Add Node.js runtime
5. Deploy this repo
```

### Environment Variables

**In Railway dashboard:**
```
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/learnverse
LLAMA_2_ENDPOINT=https://[username]-llama2-tutor.hf.space/api/predict
MISTRAL_ENDPOINT=https://[username]-mistral-lessons.hf.space
SENDGRID_API_KEY=SG.xxxxx
NODE_ENV=production
```

### Backend Server Setup

**File:** `src/pages/api/_middleware.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

/**
 * API rate limiting & validation middleware
 */
export function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  // Add CORS headers
  const response = NextResponse.next();
  response.headers.set('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
  response.headers.set('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET,POST,PUT,DELETE');
  response.headers.set('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
  
  return response;
}

export const config = {
  matcher: ['/api/:path*'],
};
```

### API Routes Structure

```
src/pages/api/
├── tutor.ts           # POST /api/tutor (question → answer)
├── lessons.ts         # GET/POST /api/lessons
├── progress.ts        # POST /api/progress (track scores)
├── health.ts          # GET /api/health (monitoring)
├── auth/
│   └── login.ts       # POST /api/auth/login
└── admin/
    └── metrics.ts     # GET /api/admin/metrics
```

---

## Component 3: Database (PostgreSQL on Railway) — FREE

### Schema Setup

**File:** `src/db/schema.sql`

```sql
-- Students
CREATE TABLE students (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  family_name VARCHAR(100),
  avatar VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '👦',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  last_active TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE(name, family_name)
);

-- Lessons (generated by Content Agent)
CREATE TABLE lessons (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  grade INT NOT NULL,
  subject VARCHAR(50), -- 'math', 'ela', 'science', 'social-studies'
  curriculum_standard VARCHAR(50), -- 'CCSS.MATH.3.OA.A.1'
  difficulty INT CHECK (difficulty BETWEEN 1 AND 5), -- 1-5
  content TEXT NOT NULL, -- Main explanation
  examples JSONB NOT NULL, -- ["example 1", "example 2"]
  questions JSONB NOT NULL, -- [{ "text": "q", "options": [...], "correct": 0 }, ...]
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  source VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'ai-generated', -- 'ai-generated' or 'manual'
  UNIQUE(id)
);

-- Student progress tracking
CREATE TABLE progress (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  student_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  lesson_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES lessons(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  score INT CHECK (score BETWEEN 0 AND 100),
  time_spent_seconds INT,
  completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE(student_id, lesson_id) -- One score per lesson per student
);

-- Tutor response cache (mirror of Redis/SQLite)
CREATE TABLE tutor_cache (
  question_hash VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  question TEXT NOT NULL,
  answer TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  accessed_count INT DEFAULT 1,
  last_accessed TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Tutor query logs (for analytics)
CREATE TABLE tutor_logs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  student_id UUID REFERENCES students(id),
  question TEXT NOT NULL,
  answer TEXT,
  latency_ms INT,
  cached BOOLEAN,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Indexes for performance
CREATE INDEX idx_student_created ON students(created_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_student_active ON students(last_active DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_progress_student ON progress(student_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_progress_completed ON progress(student_id, completed);
CREATE INDEX idx_lessons_grade ON lessons(grade, subject);
CREATE INDEX idx_lessons_standard ON lessons(curriculum_standard);
CREATE INDEX idx_tutor_cache_accessed ON tutor_cache(last_accessed DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_tutor_logs_student ON tutor_logs(student_id, created_at DESC);

-- Create extensions
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp";
```

### Database Setup Steps

```bash
# 1. Connect to Railway PostgreSQL
psql postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/learnverse

# 2. Run schema.sql
\i src/db/schema.sql

# 3. Verify tables created
\dt

# 4. Test with sample data
INSERT INTO students (name, family_name) VALUES ('Alice', 'Johnson');
INSERT INTO lessons (title, grade, subject, content, examples, questions)
VALUES (
  'Understanding Fractions',
  3,
  'math',
  'A fraction is a part of a whole...',
  '["1/2 of a pizza", "1/4 of an hour"]'::jsonb,
  '[{"text": "1/2 + 1/4 = ?", "options": ["1/4", "3/4", "1/2"], "correct": 1}]'::jsonb
);
```

---

## Component 4: LLM Inference (HuggingFace Spaces) — FREE

### Llama 2 7B Deployment

**Steps:**
```
1. Create HuggingFace account (huggingface.co)
2. Go to Spaces: https://huggingface.co/spaces
3. Create new Space
4. Select: Docker runtime
5. Add files:
   - Dockerfile
   - requirements.txt
   - app.py
6. Click "Deploy"
7. Wait 5-10 minutes for model to load
8. Test endpoint with sample question
9. Copy endpoint URL to .env
```

**Dockerfile:**
```dockerfile
FROM pytorch/pytorch:2.0-cuda11.8-devel-ubuntu22.04

WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

COPY app.py .
EXPOSE 7860

CMD ["python", "app.py"]
```

**requirements.txt:**
```
transformers==4.35.2
torch==2.0.1+cu118
bitsandbytes==0.41.3
gradio==4.15.0
peft==0.7.1
```

**app.py (Full Working Code):**
```python
import torch
import gradio as gr
from transformers import AutoTokenizer, AutoModelForCausalLM, BitsAndBytesConfig

# 4-bit quantization
bnb_config = BitsAndBytesConfig(
    load_in_4bit=True,
    bnb_4bit_use_double_quant=True,
    bnb_4bit_quant_type="nf4",
    bnb_4bit_compute_dtype=torch.bfloat16
)

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf"
print("Loading model...")
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(
    model_id,
    quantization_config=bnb_config,
    device_map="auto"
)
print("Model loaded!")

def tutor_explain(question: str) -> str:
    """Generate kid-friendly explanation."""
    system = """You are a friendly 3rd grade math tutor.
    - Use simple words (grade 3 reading level)
    - Encourage the student
    - Use everyday examples (pizza, toys, animals)
    - Keep answer under 150 words
    - End with a friendly emoji"""
    
    messages = [
        {"role": "system", "content": system},
        {"role": "user", "content": question}
    ]
    
    inputs = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
        messages,
        tokenize=True,
        add_generation_prompt=True,
        return_tensors="pt"
    ).to("cuda")
    
    with torch.no_grad():
        outputs = model.generate(
            inputs,
            max_new_tokens=200,
            temperature=0.7,
            do_sample=True,
            top_p=0.9,
        )
    
    response = tokenizer.decode(
        outputs[0][inputs.shape[-1]:],
        skip_special_tokens=True
    )
    
    return response.strip()

# API endpoint
def api_endpoint(data):
    """API-compatible endpoint for Learnverse."""
    question = data[0] if isinstance(data, list) else data
    answer = tutor_explain(question)
    return [answer]

# Gradio interface (for testing)
demo = gr.Interface(
    fn=tutor_explain,
    inputs=gr.Textbox(label="What's your math question?"),
    outputs=gr.Textbox(label="Tutor's Explanation"),
    title="Learnverse Tutor - Llama 2",
    description="Ask me about fractions, multiplication, or any 3rd grade math!"
)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    demo.launch(server_name="0.0.0.0", server_port=7860)
```

**Important Notes:**
- Free tier has limits (~50 requests/month)
- With caching, this is sufficient (50 new + 700 cached = 750 total)
- Monitor usage in HuggingFace dashboard
- Upgrade to Inference API if needed ($1-2/month)

---

## Component 5: Caching Layer (SQLite + Redis Plan)

### Phase 1: SQLite In-Memory Cache

**File:** `src/utils/cache.ts`

```typescript
import Database from 'better-sqlite3';

export class CacheManager {
  private db: Database.Database;
  private ttlMs: number;
  
  constructor(ttlDays: number = 30) {
    // In-memory database (persists during server uptime)
    this.db = new Database(':memory:');
    this.ttlMs = ttlDays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
    
    // Create cache table
    this.db.exec(`
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cache (
        key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        value TEXT NOT NULL,
        created_at INTEGER,
        accessed_count INTEGER DEFAULT 1
      );
      CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cache_accessed ON cache(accessed_count DESC);
    `);
  }
  
  async set(key: string, value: string): Promise<void> {
    const stmt = this.db.prepare(`
      INSERT OR REPLACE INTO cache (key, value, created_at, accessed_count)
      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
    `);
    stmt.run(key, value, Date.now(), 1);
  }
  
  async get(key: string): Promise<string | null> {
    const stmt = this.db.prepare(`
      SELECT value, accessed_count FROM cache WHERE key = ?
    `);
    const row = stmt.get(key) as any;
    
    if (!row) return null;
    
    // Update access count
    const updateStmt = this.db.prepare(`
      UPDATE cache SET accessed_count = accessed_count + 1 WHERE key = ?
    `);
    updateStmt.run(key);
    
    return row.value;
  }
  
  getStats() {
    const stmt = this.db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM cache');
    const result = stmt.get() as any;
    return {
      size: result.count,
      maxSize: 10000, // Arbitrary limit
      ttlDays: this.ttlMs / (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),
    };
  }
}

export const cacheManager = new CacheManager(30); // 30-day TTL
```

### Phase 2: Redis Cache (Month 2+)

When scaling to 1K+ users, migrate to Redis:

```typescript
import Redis from 'ioredis';

const redis = new Redis(process.env.REDIS_URL);

await redis.set(key, value, 'EX', 30 * 24 * 60 * 60); // 30-day TTL
const cached = await redis.get(key);
```

---

## Component 6: Email (SendGrid) — FREE → ~$10/month Phase 2

### Setup SendGrid Free Tier

```bash
1. Create account: sendgrid.com/free
2. Create API key
3. Add to .env: SENDGRID_API_KEY=SG.xxxxx
4. Free tier: 100 emails/day (sufficient for <500 users)
```

**Email Service:**

```typescript
// src/utils/email.ts
import sgMail from '@sendgrid/mail';

sgMail.setApiKey(process.env.SENDGRID_API_KEY || '');

export async function sendParentEmail(
  parentEmail: string,
  studentName: string,
  metrics: any
) {
  const msg = {
    to: parentEmail,
    from: 'hello@learnverse.ai',
    subject: `${studentName}'s Weekly Progress Report 📊`,
    html: `
      <h2>Hello! 👋</h2>
      <p>${studentName} had a great week learning!</p>
      <ul>
        <li>Lessons completed: ${metrics.lessons}</li>
        <li>Average accuracy: ${metrics.accuracy}%</li>
        <li>Daily streak: ${metrics.streak} days 🔥</li>
      </ul>
      <a href="https://learnverse.app/parent/dashboard">View full dashboard →</a>
    `,
  };

  try {
    await sgMail.send(msg);
    console.log('Email sent to', parentEmail);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('SendGrid error:', error);
  }
}
```

---

## Component 7: Monitoring & Error Tracking

### Sentry (Error Tracking) — FREE Tier

```bash
1. Create account: sentry.io
2. Create project for Next.js
3. Copy DSN to .env
```

**Setup in Next.js:**

```typescript
// next.config.js
module.exports = withSentryConfig(
  {
    // existing config
  },
  {
    org: process.env.SENTRY_ORG,
    project: process.env.SENTRY_PROJECT,
    authToken: process.env.SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN,
  }
);
```

### Console Logging (Phase 1)

```typescript
// src/utils/logger.ts
export function logInfo(message: string, data?: any) {
  console.log(`[INFO] ${new Date().toISOString()}: ${message}`, data);
}

export function logError(message: string, error: any) {
  console.error(`[ERROR] ${new Date().toISOString()}: ${message}`, error);
}

export function logMetric(metric: string, value: number) {
  console.log(`[METRIC] ${metric}=${value}`);
}
```

---

## Component 8: Status Monitoring

### Uptime.com (FREE tier)

```
1. Create account: uptime.com
2. Add monitor for learnverse-delta.vercel.app
3. Free tier: Check every 5 minutes
4. Alerts: Email on downtime
```

---

## Cost Summary

| Component | Phase 1 | Phase 2+ | Notes |
|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| Vercel | Free | Free | Already deployed |
| Railway | Free | $5-10 | DB upgrade at 10K requests |
| LLama 2 (HF) | Free | $2-5 | Better GPU tier |
| Mistral (HF) | Free | Free | Batch only |
| SendGrid | Free | $10 | 100→300 emails/day |
| Sentry | Free | Free | Unlimited errors on free tier |
| Redis | — | $2-5 | Added in Phase 2 |
| Domain | $1 | $1 | Amortized from yearly |
| **Total** | **$1** | **$25-35** | Per month |

**Phase 1 Remaining Budget:** $50 - $1 = **$49/month buffer**

---

## Environment Configuration

**File:** `.env.local`

```
# Frontend
NEXT_PUBLIC_TUTOR_ENDPOINT=https://[username]-llama2-tutor.hf.space
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000

# Database
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/learnverse

# LLM Services
LLAMA_2_ENDPOINT=https://[username]-llama2-tutor.hf.space/api/predict
MISTRAL_ENDPOINT=https://[username]-mistral-lessons-gen.hf.space

# Email
SENDGRID_API_KEY=SG.xxxxx

# Monitoring
SENTRY_DSN=https://xxxxx@sentry.io/xxxxx

# Node
NODE_ENV=production
```

- [ ] Create Railway project

- [ ] Deploy Llama 2 to HuggingFace Spaces

- [ ] Test `/api/tutor` endpoint
- [ ] Test `/api/lessons` endpoint
- [ ] Setup SendGrid API key
- [ ] Enable Sentry monitoring
- [ ] Create Uptime.com monitor
- [ ] Document all endpoints in README
